text: - A. Time and Materials - Not to Exceed. Subcontractor agrees that, in the event of a loss that is covered or may be  covered  by  the  applicable  Builder's  Risk  or  similar  type  property  insurance  policy,  that  all  costs  for remediation, repair, or replacement of the damaged work shall be performed on a strict time and materials basis,  with  an  agreed  upon  not  to  exceed  amount.  Subcontractor  shall  provide  all  signed  time  sheets, invoices, receipts, purchase orders, material take offs, and material delivery logs necessary to support the costs claimed by Subcontractor under the claim.
